headline: Quest Diagnostics Inc (NYSE:DGX): A Top Dividend Stock with Sustainable Income and Growth Potential
summary: Quest Diagnostics (DGX) offers a 1.75% dividend yield with strong 7.42% annual growth. Featuring a sustainable 35% payout ratio and solid profitability, this stock balances reliable income with financial stability.
